name: clickhouse-deploy-integration
description: Deploy ClickHouse-backed applications to Vercel, Fly.io, and Cloud Run with connection pooling, secrets, and health checks. Use when deploying applications that connect to ClickHouse Cloud, configuring platform secrets, or setting up deployment pipelines. Trigger: "deploy clickhouse app", "clickhouse Vercel", "clickhouse Cloud Run", "clickhouse production deploy", "clickhouse Fly.io".
